paragraphs: The stock price of Fermi Inc. is currently 6.05, representing a 2.02% increase from the prior close. Over a window of 20 sessions, the price has decreased by 36.32%. There have been 2 new news articles in the last 24 hours.

Recent news headlines include an article from simplywall.st discussing the resignation of director Miles Everson due to governance concerns and a $375M convertibles deal, as well as an article from Yahoo Finance suggesting that Fermi stock may be above fair value after a note offering. These articles were published on July 17 and July 16, respectively.

There have been various SEC filings recently, including an 8-K form filed on July 15 regarding the issuance of $431.25 million in aggregate principal amount of 5.00% convertible senior notes due 2031, and another 8-K form filed on July 13 disclosing the resignation of director Miles Everson. Additionally, there was one Form 4 filing in the feed, indicating insider activity.
